name: @mdscript/mds-wasm
description: WebAssembly build of the MDS (Markdown Script) compiler — used as the portable fallback by @mdscript/mds

scripts.build: wasm-pack build ../../crates/mds-wasm --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/mds-wasm/dist/node --out-name mds_wasm && wasm-pack build ../../crates/mds-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/mds-wasm/dist/web --out-name mds_wasm && rm -f dist/node/.gitignore dist/web/.gitignore
